summary:
The LINCS L1000 dataset includes gene expression data from drug-treated human cells, a core component of its experimental design aimed at understanding drug effects on cellular biology. While the retrieved documentation did not explicitly confirm this detail, established scientific knowledge supports that the dataset was designed around measuring transcriptomic responses in human cell line treatments.  

{yes}
